description:
## [1.37.0](https://github.com/Ripthulhu/morphe-youtube/compare/v1.36.2...v1.37.0) (2026-07-19)

### ✨ Features

* **youtube:** add authenticated Voice Assistant YouTube API provider with verified playback control and now-playing state
* **music:** add authenticated Voice Assistant YouTube Music API provider with verified transport and volume control

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **keep:** point the caller allowlist at app.ripthulhu.voiceassistant and log refused callers
